info.title: Smart Tests Intake API
info.description: API for accessing test execution data, flaky test reports, and test results

tags.name: Test Data View
tags.description: APIs for viewing test execution data and flaky test reports

get.description: Retrieve test execution results with filtering and pagination. Returns detailed test case execution history including status, duration, and optional logs.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date for range query (ISO-8601: YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date for range query (ISO-8601: YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: include-logs
parameters.description: Include test execution logs in response

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

400.description: Invalid parameters (missing test-path, invalid limit/offset, branch/test-suite not found, invalid date range)

get.description: Retrieve flaky test data for specified time period. Returns weekly aggregated flaky test scores and metadata.

parameters.name: year-week
parameters.description: Specific ISO year-week to fetch (format: YYYY-Www, e.g., 2026-W15)

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date for range query (ISO-8601: YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date for range query (ISO-8601: YYYY-MM-DD)

200.description: Successful retrieval of flaky test data

400.description: Invalid parameters (weeks out of range 1-12, limit out of range 1-500, invalid date format)

JSTestResult.description: Test execution result with detailed status and session information

JSTestResultsViewResponse.description: Paginated test results response with metadata

smartTestsToken.description: Smart Tests API token for authentication
smartTestsToken.name: Authorization
